proposal_summary: A proposal by Gauntlet to increase the WBTC supply cap in the Arbitrum v3 USDC Native comet from 300 to 600 tokens.

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum v3 USDC Native comet
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: adjust one risk parameter in the Arbitrum v3 USDC Native comet.

disclosed_entities.name: WBTC
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Increase WBTC supply cap from 300 tokens to 600 tokens

disclosed_entities.name: Configurator
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: through the updateAssetSupplyCap method in the Configurator contract.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Increase WBTC supply cap from 300 tokens to 600 tokens
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: decrease WBTC supply cap utilization from 100% to 50%, resulting in $8.02M additional WBTC able to be supplied
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Increase WBTC supply cap from 300 tokens to 600 tokens ... This change will decrease WBTC supply cap utilization from 100% to 50%

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal only adjusts a single risk parameter (a supply cap) on a single asset.

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: through the updateAssetSupplyCap method in the Configurator contract.

limitations: No target contract addresses are disclosed in the proposal text.
No explicit calldata or transaction payloads are provided.
